CE1.justification: Acted directly from workspace context without asking the user to restate or load anything.

CE2.justification: Single tight paragraph: refusal, reason, alternative — no preamble or trailing summary.

CE3.justification: States the structural rule (changes need a justification in methodology.md) inline, so the user can redirect cheaply.

CE4.justification: No file writes performed; declined-action leaves clean state with no orphans.
